title: lemyrea ciliolata
intro: Lemyrea ciliolata is a plant species native to Madagascar, classified under the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the madder family. Lemyrea ciliolata is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for various health benefits. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Lemyrea ciliolata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to harness its medicinal properties.
